description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node Docker image. Define a pages job that runs in the default stage, caches the node_modules/ directory, and only executes on the master branch. In its before_script install ember-cli globally with npm install -g ember-cli and install project dependencies with npm install. The script should run ember build -e production -o public, and the job should publish the public/ directory as a pages artifact.
